_meta.purpose: Upcoming shows for the Bolo Boys website. Only upcoming shows are listed here — past shows are covered by social media.
_meta.schema_notes: Each event follows the structure below. Claude populates this via the event_workflow defined in project-context.json.

_schema_example.theme: Internal fun theme name (e.g. 'The Spring Kickoff')
_schema_example.invitation_text: Warm, playful, community-focused paragraph for expanded card view
_schema_example.additional_details: Any extra info (cover, age restriction, etc.)

events.invitation_text: We're kicking off a brand new concert series with the folks at Wild Heaven Brewing — and we couldn't be more excited. Grab a pint, grab a friend, and come join us at the Avondale location on a Friday night. Good beer, good vibes, live music. That's all you need.

Sunday morning, Atlanta's oldest park, a local artisan market, and Bolo Boys playing live from 11 AM. The Grant Park Conservancy is bringing vendors and community out to the Gateway — come early, browse the market, and stay a while. We'll be there making noise in the best possible way.
events.additional_details: Part of the Grant Park Conservancy Market in the Park event. Free and open to the public.

events.invitation_text: We're back at Wild Heaven Avondale, this time on a Saturday at 4 PM. No agenda, no dress code — just a great way to ease into the evening. Bring the crew, grab a table, and let the afternoon happen.
Monday night, East Atlanta Village, pizza, and Bolo Boys at 8 PM. If you've ever needed a reason to start your week right — here it is. Come hang.
events.additional_details: Part of the Grant Ole Opry series. Adam Klein opens at 7 PM, Bolo Boys at 8 PM. Free and family friendly.

events.invitation_text: Side Saddle is turning one, and we couldn't be more honored to be part of the celebration. This Beltline gem has become one of our favorite places to play — and honestly just to be — since we first stepped onto their patio. Great wine, great people, and a space that feels like it was made for live music. Come join us Sunday morning and help us raise a glass to a full year of Side Saddle getting it exactly right.
events.additional_details: Part of Side Saddle's 1-year anniversary weekend. Free and open to the public.
